title: Restart the agent service
body: After changing agent configuration, restart the agent service so the new settings load. Use the service control panel or run the restart action from the admin tools menu. A restart does not delete session history.

title: When to create a support ticket
body: Create a support ticket when the knowledge base does not resolve the issue, or when you need a human operator to follow up. Include a clear subject and a short description of steps already tried.

title: TROZBOT is a robot concierge
body: TROZBOT is a clearly non-human robot support concierge. It answers from the knowledge base and can create tickets. It does not pretend to be a human support representative.

title: Check service status
body: To check whether a TROZLANIO service is healthy, open the status panel or call the service health endpoint (typically GET /health). A response with ok true means the process is up. Status checks are read-only and do not change configuration.

title: What to put in a ticket
body: A useful ticket has a short subject and a body with: what you expected, what happened, steps already tried, and any error codes. TROZBOT can create the ticket for you via create_ticket after you provide subject and body.

title: Support session basics
body: Each robot session has an id and avatar states idle, listening, thinking, and speaking. Start a session before asking the knowledge base or creating a ticket. Sessions are local demo state unless wired to durable storage.
